sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 15

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 15:1
items.html: (to the question) The first time is to their upper-upper, when they receive the discernment of their Rucha [spirit] in the Zivug [coupling] upon their added MAN [Mayin Nukvin]; except that in this first Zivug they receive no form, and the upper one takes their share. And the second time — namely, after they descend with their upper one to the place of the upper one — the upper one then gives them the form of Ibur [conception]. (p. 735, Item 6)
